formal_rule_source: ChatGPT project File Library unique filename containing CURRENT_唯一正式规则

formal_governance_runtime.policy: Final artifacts report formal rule authority from active governance while preserving the validated underlying implementation version separately for auditability.

conditional_allocation_challenger.invariant: preserve final calibrated total-goals marginal within floating-point tolerance
conditional_allocation_challenger.unpromoted_competitions_policy: All competitions without an explicit valid competition-specific receipt remain formal_weight=0.

total_goals_peak_diagnostics.policy: If final total-goals Top-1 minus Top-2 is below 2 percentage points, label as 峰值平台/弱Top-1. Diagnostic is read-only and may never manufacture or redistribute probability mass.

dynamic_strength_challenger.reason: No auditable historical roster-continuity, coach-continuity, promotion/relegation structural-break training chain and no competition-specific rolling OOF promotion receipt.

historical_market_lomo_chain.question_time_snapshot_policy: A complete synchronized tradable current snapshot may be marked complete, but it cannot activate formal market coordination or EV without a competition- and season-specific LOMO/OOS receipt.

runtime_capabilities: preserve complete official XI as observed
preserve source-backed predicted XI as predicted only
compute probable Top-11 from strictly prior same-season observed XIs plus point-in-time availability when executable inputs exist
downgrade bare probable status without executable XI inputs
probabilistic_lineup_route.numeric_effect_policy: Lineup projection can affect evidence status and confidence gating only. It cannot change formal score probabilities until competition-specific chronological OOF validation and promotion.

total_tail_challenger_v470.reason: Evidence is promising for USA_MLS but this module is not a registered formal V4.7 challenger in CURRENT; any formal use requires a future complete CURRENT upgrade.

v480_direct_total_distribution_research.conclusion: The direct categorical 0-7+ replacement family did not produce any competition that cleared the strict first-stage Champion comparison. No V4.8 total-probability upgrade is justified by this research round.
v480_direct_total_distribution_research.policy: No V4.8 research result may alter V4.7 formal probabilities without a complete future CURRENT upgrade and independent promotion evidence.

activation_policy: V4.7.0 governance and competition independence remain formally active. USA_MLS 2026 conditional_allocation_v470 is applied only through its hash-bound promotion and runtime activation receipts after OOF matrix calibration. Final total-goals Top-1/Top-2 peak-strength diagnostics are formally active as a read-only CURRENT-required output layer and never change probabilities. Question-time market completeness, formal market coordination and formal EV are separate gates; no production LOMO receipt currently exists, so formal EV remains unavailable. Probable-lineup projection is runtime-active for auditable XI evidence but has formal probability effect weight 0. Final artifacts report V4.7.0 as rule authority while preserving V4.6.x implementation metadata separately. All other competitions and challengers remain fail-closed at formal_weight=0 unless separately promoted. The V4.6.4 implementation remains the underlying base probability center and has no rule authority.
